title: Origins, Vanilla+ Modpack
body:
## A Origins, Vanilla plus modpack.

Some Origins are included in the mods but most are inside the datapack folder and need to be added when creating the world.

### **Main mods:**
- Origins
- Tetra
- Create
- Farmer's Delight
- Aquaculture 2
- Simple Storage Network
- End Remastered

> +Addon mods to tie them all together
+Optimization/Performance mods

There are also Vanilla like structures and new world gen in the Overworld, Nether and End. Structures spawn rate has been decreased to reduce clutter and eye sores. Improved Ender Dragon fight by using, **True Ending: Ender Dragon Overhaul** and **YUNG's Better End Island**.

**Hope you enjoy my first modpack :)**

### **Mods only available on Curseforge:**
- [Aquaculture 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
- [Aquaculture Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight)
- [Realm RPG: Sea Dwellers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-sea-dwellers)
